+function distKm(
+  lat1: number,
+  lon1: number,
+  lat2: number,
+  lon2: number,
+): number {
+  const R = 6371
+  const dLat = ((lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI) / 180
+  const dLon = ((lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI) / 180
+  const a =
+    Math.sin(dLat / 2) ** 2 +
+    Math.cos((lat1 * Math.PI) / 180) *
+      Math.cos((lat2 * Math.PI) / 180) *
+      Math.sin(dLon / 2) ** 2
+  return R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a))
 }

+  className?: string

+  containerClassName?: string
   /**

-  safeAreaClassName?: string;
+  safeAreaClassName?: string
+  /**
+   * Constrain content width on web.

 }
 
 /**
@@ -40,29 +48,37 @@ export interface ScreenContainerProps extends ViewProps {
  */

   children,
-  edges = ["top", "left", "right"],
+  edges = ['top', 'left', 'right'],
   className,
   containerClassName,
   safeAreaClassName,
+  webMaxWidth = 1320,
+  disableWebMaxWidth = false,
   style,
   ...props
 }: ScreenContainerProps) {
+  const constrainedStyle =
+    Platform.OS === 'web' &amp;&amp; !disableWebMaxWidth
+      ? ({width: '100%', maxWidth: webMaxWidth, alignSelf: 'center'} as const)

+

diff --git a/global.css b/global.css
index b5c61c9..515d8a8 100644
--- a/global.css
+++ b/global.css
@@ -1,3 +1,76 @@
+@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700;800&amp;family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&amp;family=Spectral:wght@500;600&amp;family=Unbounded:wght@500;700;800&amp;display=swap');
+
 @tailwind base;
 @tailwind components;
 @tailwind utilities;
+
+@layer base {
+  :root {
+    color-scheme: dark;
+  }
+
+  html,
+  body,
+  #root {
+    min-height: 100%;
+  }
+
+  body {
+    margin: 0;
+    font-family: 'Manrope', 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
+    color: var(--color-foreground);
+    background:
+      radial-gradient(
+        1000px 520px at 12% -10%,
+        rgba(86, 204, 255, 0.18),
+        transparent 62%
+      ),
+      radial-gradient(
+        700px 460px at 88% -18%,
+        rgba(34, 225, 166, 0.14),
+        transparent 58%
+      ),
+      radial-gradient(
+        900px 620px at 52% 118%,
+        rgba(29, 155, 240, 0.15),
+        transparent 60%
+      ),
+      var(--color-background);
+    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
+    text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
+  }
+
+  * {
+    scrollbar-color: rgba(118, 143, 188, 0.65) transparent;
+    scrollbar-width: thin;
+  }
+}
+
+@layer utilities {
+  .font-display {
+    font-family: 'Unbounded', 'Avenir Next', sans-serif;
+  }
+
+  .font-meta {
+    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SFMono-Regular', Menlo, monospace;
+  }
+
+  .web-panel {
+    background: linear-gradient(
+      155deg,
+      rgba(16, 24, 42, 0.9),
+      rgba(8, 13, 24, 0.86)
+    );
+    border: 1px solid rgba(151, 181, 235, 0.22);
+    box-shadow:
+      0 18px 42px rgba(2, 8, 20, 0.5),
+      inset 0 1px 0 rgba(200, 220, 255, 0.08);
+    backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(120%);
+  }
+
+  .web-pill {
+    border: 1px solid rgba(150, 180, 235, 0.26);
+    background: rgba(12, 20, 34, 0.72);
+    backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(120%);
+  }
+}

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Analyzing multiple runtime and contract issues**</details></think>

---

I’ve identified a couple of concrete contract/runtime regressions and one major map lifecycle bug tied to the redesigned Leaflet integration. I’m compiling them now in severity order with exact file evidence and suggested fixes.## Findings

### [CRITICAL] API contract mismatch: client requests exceed server schema limits
**Files:** `app/(tabs)/index.tsx`, `app/widget.tsx`, `server/routers.ts`  
**Impact:** Both map screens can fail their `sightings.list` query with tRPC/Zod validation errors (`limit` > `100`), leading to missing data or broken initial render.

```73:76:app/(tabs)/index.tsx
  } = trpc.sightings.list.useQuery({
    hideHidden: true,
    limit: 500,
  })
```

```17:20:app/widget.tsx
  const {data: sightings} = trpc.sightings.list.useQuery(
    {limit: 200, hideHidden: true},
    {refetchInterval: 15000},
  )
```

```30:35:server/routers.ts
          .object({
            limit: z.number().min(1).max(100).optional(),
            offset: z.number().min(0).optional(),
            minCredibility: z.number().min(0).max(100).optional(),
            hideHidden: z.boolean().optional(),
```

**Fix:** Clamp both client calls to `<= 100` (or widen backend limit intentionally).

---

### [HIGH] Leaflet map is re-initialized on `center`/`zoom` changes
**File:** `components/leaflet-map.tsx`  
**Impact:** Recreating map instance on prop changes can cause flicker, control state reset, marker rehydration churn, and user-interaction jank. Because `center` is passed as a new array from callers, this can happen frequently.

```205:207:components/leaflet-map.tsx
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isClient || !mapContainerRef.current || initializedRef.current) return
    initializedRef.current = true
```

```290:297:components/leaflet-map.tsx
    return () => {
      if (mapRef.current) {
        mapRef.current.remove()
        mapRef.current = null
        initializedRef.current = false
      }
    }
  }, [isClient, center, zoom])
```

**Fix:** Keep initialization effect dependent on `isClient` only; handle `center/zoom` updates in separate `setView` effect.

---

### [HIGH] Camera “gallery” action routes to submit without required payload
**Files:** `app/camera.tsx`, `app/submit.tsx`  
**Impact:** Tapping gallery can navigate with no `photoBase64`/coords. Submit screen then computes `NaN` coordinates and attempts submission with invalid/missing required fields, causing failed report flow.

```321:325:app/camera.tsx
        <Pressable
          onPress={() => {
            if (stream) stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop())
            router.push('/submit' as any)
```

```43:47:app/submit.tsx
  const photoUri = params.photoUri as string
  const photoBase64 = params.photoBase64 as string
  const latitude = parseFloat(params.latitude as string)


---
